creator: coco@executive-computing.de
text:
Created attachment 143545
sendip-2.5.patch

- Unbreak by fixing compile errors, bump PORTREVISION to 2
- Respect CFLAGS / LDFLAGS
- Add staging support
- More minor fixes

I ran regression tests for my use cases, but for anything else this is more of a case of 'It compiles! Ship it!', as grog@ would probably put it.

I am interested in taking maintainership of this port, if the original maintainer is unavailable or lost interest.

Port maintainer (joseph@randomnetworks.com) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 1.02 (mode: update, diff: SVN)
